entries.name: 🌸 再飘一段
entries.replaceString: <button style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border:1.5px solid rgba(200,140,170,.32);padding:10px 20px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;letter-spacing:1.5px;transition:all .18s;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,245,250,.96),rgba(248,228,240,.96));color:#7a2848;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(140,60,100,.12),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.9) inset;" onmouseenter="this.style.transform='translateY(-2px)';this.style.filter='brightness(1.04)'" onmouseleave="this.style.transform='';this.style.filter=''" onmousedown="this.style.transform='scale(.96) translateY(1px)'" onmouseup="this.style.transform='translateY(-2px)'" onclick="(function(){if(typeof tavo!=='undefined'){tavo.input.set('[再飘一段]');tavo.input.send();}})()">🌸 继续飘落</button>

entries.replaceString: <style id="sp-gs">@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');body{font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif!important}.bg-sky{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% -10%,rgba(255,220,235,.7) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 10% 80%,rgba(180,100,140,.4) 0%,transparent 55%),linear-gradient(175deg,#e8b8cc 0%,#d4889e 30%,#c4789a 60%,#b06085 100%)}.mist{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:-10%;width:120%;pointer-events:none;z-index:1}.mist-1{height:220px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 100% at 50% 100%,rgba(250,235,245,.55) 0%,transparent 70%);animation:mistD 18s ease-in-out infinite alternate}.mist-2{height:160px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 100% at 40% 100%,rgba(245,225,238,.4) 0%,transparent 65%);animation:mistD 24s ease-in-out infinite alternate-reverse}@keyframes mistD{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(4%)}}.hills{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:200px;z-index:2;pointer-events:none}.hill{position:absolute;bottom:0;border-radius:50% 50% 0 0}.hill-1{left:-5%;width:55%;height:160px;background:rgba(140,60,95,.35)}.hill-2{left:35%;width:50%;height:130px;background:rgba(120,50,85,.3)}.hill-3{right:-5%;width:45%;height:180px;background:rgba(100,40,75,.25)}#sp-pc{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:3;pointer-events:none}.sp-ff{position:fixed;border-radius:50%;width:3px;height:3px;background:rgba(255,240,200,.8);box-shadow:0 0 4px 2px rgba(255,220,160,.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:4;animation:spFF ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes spFF{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0);opacity:0}20%{opacity:.9}50%{transform:translate(var(--tx),var(--ty));opacity:.6}80%{opacity:.4}}.sp-br{position:fixed;z-index:5;pointer-events:none;opacity:.72}.sp-br-t{top:-10px;left:-20px;width:380px}.sp-br-r{top:80px;right:-40px;width:280px;transform:scaleX(-1) rotate(20deg)}@keyframes spBS{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg) scale(1)}33%{transform:rotate(3deg) scale(1.03)}66%{transform:rotate(-2deg) scale(.98)}}.sp-bg{animation:spBS 4s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:center}.sp-kg{position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-size:260px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.022);pointer-events:none;z-index:1;user-select:none}.sp-lr{position:fixed;top:-10%;left:50%;width:1px;height:60vh;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,230,240,.3) 0%,transparent 100%);transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(-15deg) scaleX(80);filter:blur(30px);pointer-events:none;z-index:2;animation:spLR 8s ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes spLR{0%{opacity:.4;transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(-15deg) scaleX(80)}100%{opacity:.7;transform:translateX(-40%) rotate(-12deg) scaleX(100)}}.sp-rd{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;z-index:25;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 5%,rgba(250,210,228,.6) 25%,rgba(255,228,240,1) 50%,rgba(250,210,228,.6) 75%,transparent 95%);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(240,180,210,.4)}.sp-st{position:fixed;top:60px;right:16px;z-index:20;writing-mode:vertical-rl;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.32);font-weight:300}.sp-gb{position:fixed;bottom:90px;right:18px;z-index:20;width:64px;height:64px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:28px;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(140,60,100,.2);animation:spGB 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes spGB{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-3deg)}100%{transform:translateY(-8px) rotate(3deg)}}.sp-dp{position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:6;animation:spDP ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes spDP{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg)}100%{transform:translateY(-10px) rotate(8deg)}}.sp-cp{position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:6;opacity:0;animation:spCP linear infinite}@keyframes spCP{0%{transform:translateY(-20px) rotate(0deg) translateX(0);opacity:0}8%{opacity:.65}90%{opacity:.45}100%{transform:translateY(110vh) rotate(360deg) translateX(var(--sw,30px));opacity:0}}.sp-ps{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:55px;pointer-events:none;z-index:8;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-around;padding:0 20px 5px}.sp-psi{font-size:13px;opacity:.28;animation:spPI ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes spPI{0%{transform:rotate(-5deg)}100%{transform:rotate(5deg)}}/* ── 角色卡片 ── */.sp-w{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#fdf8fb 0%,#faeef4 40%,#f7e8f1 70%,#fdf4f8 100%);border:1.5px solid rgba(200,140,170,.3);border-radius:18px;overflow:visible;box-shadow:0 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.85) inset,0 -1px 0 rgba(180,110,145,.12) inset,0 10px 36px rgba(140,60,100,.13),0 2px 8px rgba(160,80,120,.08),0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.4);position:relative;margin-bottom:4px}.sp-inner{border-radius:17px;overflow:hidden;position:relative}.sp-sh{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:55%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.55) 0%,transparent 100%);pointer-events:none;z-index:0;border-radius:17px 17px 0 0}.sp-w::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1.5px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 5%,rgba(210,150,180,.35) 20%,rgba(248,200,220,.95) 50%,rgba(210,150,180,.35) 80%,transparent 95%);z-index:3;border-radius:17px 17px 0 0}.sp-wb{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(200,140,170,.25) 40%,rgba(215,155,180,.45) 50%,rgba(200,140,170,.25) 60%,transparent);z-index:10}.sp-cn{position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;z-index:15}.sp-tl{top:-1px;left:-1px;border-top:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-left:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-radius:5px 0 0 0}.sp-tr{top:-1px;right:-1px;border-top:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-right:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-radius:0 5px 0 0}.sp-bl{bottom:-1px;left:-1px;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-left:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-radius:0 0 0 5px}.sp-br2{bottom:-1px;right:-1px;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-right:2px solid rgba(195,125,158,.55);border-radius:0 0 5px 0}.sp-sl{position:absolute;top:0;left:9px;bottom:0;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(200,140,170,.1) 20%,rgba(200,140,170,.1) 80%,transparent);z-index:2}.sp-sr{position:absolute;top:0;right:9px;bottom:0;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(200,140,170,.1) 20%,rgba(200,140,170,.1) 80%,transparent);z-index:2}/* 卡片外部漂浮装饰 */.sp-deco-wrap{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;z-index:20}.sp-deco-tl{top:-18px;left:-14px}.sp-deco-tr{top:-16px;right:-12px}.sp-deco-bl{bottom:-16px;left:-10px}.sp-deco-br{bottom:-18px;right:-14px}.sp-deco-wrap span{display:block;animation:spDW ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes spDW{0%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(1)}100%{transform:translateY(-5px) rotate(12deg) scale(1.05)}}/* 标题栏 */.sp-hd{padding:12px 24px 10px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(252,242,248,0) 0%,rgba(248,228,240,.88) 20%,rgba(244,218,234,1) 50%,rgba(248,228,240,.88) 80%,rgba(252,242,248,0) 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(210,150,178,.14);position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center}.sp-hdd{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px}.sp-hl{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(185,115,150,.26));max-width:48px}.sp-hlr{background:linear-gradient(270deg,transparent,rgba(185,115,150,.26))}.sp-hl-lb{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:5px;color:#8a4060;white-space:nowrap}/* 正文 */.sp-bd{position:relative;z-index:1;padding:16px 20px 14px}.sp-bd p{color:#3d1e2e;font-size:14.5px;line-height:2.2;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:.4px;font-weight:400}.sp-bd p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}.sp-bd strong,.sp-bd b{color:#7a2848;font-weight:700}.sp-bd em,.sp-bd i{color:#b05075;font-style:italic;font-weight:500}.sp-act{color:#b05075;font-style:italic;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.35px}.sp-bd h1,.sp-bd h2,.sp-bd h3{color:#7a2848;font-weight:600;margin:16px 0 9px;letter-spacing:4px;text-align:center;font-size:12.5px}.sp-bd h1::before,.sp-bd h2::before,.sp-bd h3::before{content:'»8 '}.sp-bd h1::after,.sp-bd h2::after,.sp-bd h3::after{content:' »8'}.sp-bd hr{border:none;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(200,140,170,.28),rgba(210,150,178,.45),rgba(200,140,170,.28),transparent);margin:13px 0}.sp-bd ul,.sp-bd ol{padding-left:16px;color:#3d1e2e;font-size:14px;line-height:2.1;margin:8px 0}.sp-bd li::marker{color:#c87090}.sp-bd blockquote{border:none;border-left:2px solid rgba(180,100,140,.32);background:rgba(240,210,225,.28);padding:11px 15px 11px 17px;margin:13px 0;color:#5a2840;font-style:italic;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0}.sp-bd table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:11px 0}.sp-bd th{background:rgba(230,195,215,.48);color:#7a2848;padding:8px 12px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,140,170,.28);font-weight:600}.sp-bd td{padding:8px 12px;font-size:13.5px;color:#3d1e2e;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,140,170,.1);text-align:center}.sp-dv{height:1px;margin:11px 0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(200,140,170,.22) 30%,rgba(215,155,180,.42) 50%,rgba(200,140,170,.22) 70%,transparent)}/* 面板/进度条/人物/线索 */.sp-pn{background:rgba(255,255,255,.55);border:1px solid rgba(200,140,170,.2);border-radius:12px;margin:12px 0;overflow:hidden}.sp-pt{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(240,210,225,.6),rgba(245,218,232,.8),rgba(240,210,225,.6));color:#7a2848;padding:7px 14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:3.5px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,140,170,.16);text-align:center}.sp-pb{padding:11px 13px}.sp-rw{display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:9px;gap:10px}.sp-lb{font-size:11px;color:#6a3050;min-width:52px;flex-shrink:0}.sp-tr2{flex:1;height:3px;background:rgba(200,140,170,.14);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden}.sp-fi{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#c07090,#e8a0c0,#f5c0d8);border-radius:2px}.sp-nm{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#a04060;min-width:24px;text-align:right}.sp-ch{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;margin-bottom:7px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.5);border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(200,140,170,.16)}.sp-av{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0c8dc,#e0a8c8);border:1.5px solid rgba(200,130,160,.38);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0}.sp-chn{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#3d1e2e;letter-spacing:.5px}.sp-chs{font-size:10.5px;color:#9a6080;margin-top:2px}.sp-cl{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;padding:9px 12px;margin-bottom:7px;background:rgba(240,210,225,.28);border-left:2px solid rgba(180,100,140,.38);font-size:13.5px;color:#3d1e2e;line-height:1.85;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0}.sp-cln{flex-shrink:0;font-size:9px;color:#8a4060;font-weight:600;background:rgba(220,160,190,.28);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid rgba(200,130,160,.28);margin-top:3px;letter-spacing:.8px}.sp-sep{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(200,140,170,.22),rgba(210,150,178,.38),rgba(200,140,170,.22),transparent);margin:11px 0}.sp-bdg{display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;margin:3px;background:rgba(230,190,210,.38);color:#7a2848;border:1px solid rgba(200,140,170,.28)}/* ── 用户气泡 ── */.sp-usr-row{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;align-items:flex-end;gap:0;margin:6px 0;position:relative}.sp-usr-bub{position:relative;max-width:72%;padding:11px 16px 11px 15px;font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.85;color:#3d1e2e;letter-spacing:.35px;font-weight:400;font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif}/* 主气泡体 */.sp-usr-bub::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.92) 0%,rgba(252,238,246,.95) 50%,rgba(248,228,240,.9) 100%);border:1.5px solid rgba(210,155,180,.35);border-radius:18px 18px 4px 18px;box-shadow:0 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.9) inset,0 -1px 0 rgba(180,110,145,.1) inset,0 6px 22px rgba(140,60,100,.12),0 1px 4px rgba(160,80,120,.08);z-index:0}/* 顶部光泽 */.sp-usr-bub::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:1.5px;left:1.5px;right:1.5px;height:44%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.55) 0%,transparent 100%);border-radius:17px 17px 0 0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none}.sp-usr-txt{position:relative;z-index:2}/* 顶部装饰 tag */.sp-usr-tag{position:absolute;top:-11px;right:14px;z-index:5;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f5c8de,#e8b0cc);border:1px solid rgba(210,140,170,.4);border-radius:999px;padding:2px 10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:#7a2848;letter-spacing:1.5px;white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(140,60,100,.15)}/* 角落花 */.sp-usr-fl{position:absolute;z-index:5;font-size:12px;pointer-events:none;animation:spUFL ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes spUFL{0%{transform:rotate(-8deg) scale(1)}100%{transform:rotate(8deg) scale(1.08)}}.sp-usr-fl-tl{top:-8px;left:6px;animation-duration:3.2s}.sp-usr-fl-br{bottom:-8px;right:20px;animation-duration:4s;animation-delay:.6s;font-size:10px}/* 右侧点缀线 */.sp-usr-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(210,140,170,.5);box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(210,140,170,.4);flex-shrink:0;margin-bottom:14px;animation:spUD 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes spUD{0%{opacity:.5;transform:scale(1)}100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.3)}}</style>
